topPlaces.name: Mayur Vihar Phase III
topPlaces.description: Mayur Vihar Phase-3 is the third phase of the Mayur Vihar residential area in East Delhi. It lies in Kondli constituency close to the Noida border on one side and New Kondli and Gharoli on the other.

topPlaces.name: Kondli
topPlaces.description: Kondli is a village, census town and constituency situated of East Delhi district of the National Capital Territory of Delhi, India.

topPlaces.name: Vasundhara Enclave
topPlaces.description: Vasundhara Enclave is a posh residential area located in East Delhi. The adjoining areas include Dallupura, Mayur Vihar, New Kondli and New Ashok Nagar.

topPlaces.name: Gharoli
topPlaces.description: Gharoli (also spelt as Ghadoli) is a village and census town in the Mayur Vihar Phase III area of East Delhi District in the National Capital Territory of Delhi, India.

topPlaces.name: Dallupura
topPlaces.description: Dallupura is a village situated in the Mayur Vihar Phase III area of the East Delhi district of Delhi, India. It falls under Kondli Assembly constituency and East Delhi Lok Sabha constituency.

topPlaces.name: Ghazipur landfill
topPlaces.description: The Ghazipur landfill is a landfill established in 1984. It is located in Ghazipur, a village in the eastern district of Delhi, India.

topPlaces.name: Noida Cricket Stadium
topPlaces.description: Noida Cricket Stadium, also known as Noida Stadium Complex, is a cricket stadium in Noida, India. It is located in Sector 21A of Noida, Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Modi Mall
topPlaces.description: Modi Mall, formerly named Spice World Mall and Smart Bharat Mall, is a shopping mall in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. The mall was opened in 2013 and is adjacent with Noida Cricket Stadium.

items.note: Mayur Vihar Phase-3 is the third phase of the Mayur Vihar residential area in East Delhi. It lies in Kondli constituency close to the Noida border on one side and New Kondli and Gharoli on the other.
Kondli is a village, census town and constituency situated of East Delhi district of the National Capital Territory of Delhi, India.
Vasundhara Enclave is a posh residential area located in East Delhi. The adjoining areas include Dallupura, Mayur Vihar, New Kondli and New Ashok Nagar.
Gharoli (also spelt as Ghadoli) is a village and census town in the Mayur Vihar Phase III area of East Delhi District in the National Capital Territory of Delhi, India.
Dallupura is a village situated in the Mayur Vihar Phase III area of the East Delhi district of Delhi, India. It falls under Kondli Assembly constituency and East Delhi Lok Sabha constituency.
The Ghazipur landfill is a landfill established in 1984. It is located in Ghazipur, a village in the eastern district of Delhi, India.
Noida Cricket Stadium, also known as Noida Stadium Complex, is a cricket stadium in Noida, India. It is located in Sector 21A of Noida, Uttar Pradesh.
Modi Mall, formerly named Spice World Mall and Smart Bharat Mall, is a shopping mall in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. The mall was opened in 2013 and is adjacent with Noida Cricket Stadium.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Indira Gandhi International Airport, Delhi (24 km) and the nearest railway station is New Delhi Railway Station (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi?
faq.a: Stays in St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. James' Orthodox Church, Mayur Vihar Phase-3, Delhi?
